title: Printing apparatus
abstract: There is provided a printing apparatus including a casing; a conveyor; a head; a tank; a passing port; and a cutter. The cutter includes a blade, and a moving mechanism configured to move the blade. In an orthogonal direction orthogonal to a conveyance direction and a cutting direction, at least a part of the passing port is located at a same position as the tank. In the orthogonal direction, at least a part of the cutter is located at a same position as the tank. The tank is positioned to be away from the passing port to one side in the cutting direction. A part of the cutter is positioned to be away from the passing port to the other side in the cutting direction.
claims: 1. A printing apparatus comprising: a casing; a conveyor positioned in the casing, and configured to convey a medium in a conveyance direction; a head positioned downstream of the conveyor in the conveyance direction, and configured to discharge ink toward the medium conveyed in the conveyance direction by the conveyor; a tank configured to store the ink to be supplied to the head, wherein at least a part of the tank is positioned in the casing; an exit opening being opened in the casing, wherein the medium on which the ink has discharged from the head passes through the exit opening toward the downstream in the conveyance direction; a cutter configured to cut the medium along a cutting direction crossing the conveyance direction, the cutter including: a blade; and a moving mechanism configured to move the blade in the cutting direction; a holder positioned upstream of the casing in the conveyance direction, and defining a storing space, wherein the medium which is a roll sheet is stored in the storing space such that a rotational axis of the medium is along the cutting direction; and a tray configured to support the medium which is a rectangular shaped sheet other than the roll sheet, at least a part of the tray being positioned downstream of the storing space of the holder in the conveyance direction, the tray being positioned upstream of the conveyor in the conveyance direction; wherein at least a part of the exit opening overlaps with the tank in an orthogonal direction orthogonal to the conveyance direction and the cutting direction, wherein at least a part of the cutter overlaps with the tank in the orthogonal direction, wherein at least a part of the tray is configured to overlap with the storing space of the holder in the orthogonal direction, wherein a degree of exposure of the storing space when viewed in the orthogonal direction is changed in response to the tray moving between a first position and a second position, wherein the degree of exposure of the storing space in a case that the tray is in the first position is greater than the degree of exposure of the storing space in a case that the tray is in the second position, wherein a trajectory of an upper end of the tray in a case of moving between the first position and the second position overlaps with the rotational axis of the roll sheet when viewed in the orthogonal direction, and the trajectory of the upper end of the tray is located above the rotational axis of the roll sheet, and wherein in a case that the tray is in the second position, the roll sheet stored in the storing space is conveyed toward the head in the conveyance direction.
